retry_reason: kmem_cache_destroy is unconditional and should only be called once; calling it again would be a double-free bug, so retry has no meaning.
contract_summary: This put wrapper releases the reference on the global slab cache btrfs_trans_handle_cachep used for transaction handles. It must be called exactly once during module shutdown. After this call, the cache is destroyed and must not be accessed. No return value or error handling is needed; the function is a simple release operation.
